top_signals.title: Iran to close Strait of Hormuz yet Trump threatens toll
top_signals.summary: Iran’s top military command has said it will shut the Strait of Hormuz in response to alleged violations of the ceasefire agreement though President Trump threatened to impose a toll if the stretch of water is closed off. The Iranian leadership said the crucial shipping passage will be closed to vessel traffic as the “first [...]

top_signals.title: Why the Northeast is quietly running out of diesel
top_signals.summary:
Diesel inventories on the East Coast are at record lows. Truckers are spooked by the vanishing stocks and soaring rates.

top_signals.title: Exclusive: Central Freight Lines to shut down after 96 years
top_signals.summary:
A source familiar with the 96-year-old company said he is unsure whether CFL will file Chapter 7 or “liquidate outside of bankruptcy,” but that the LTL carrier has no plans to reorganize.
